caption: The video captures a live performance or presentation in a well-lit auditorium with wooden blinds covering the windows. A man is seated on stage, playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a red design and a dark vest. To his left, another person is seated at a podium, possibly moderating or providing commentary. The audience, consisting of people of various ages, is seated in rows, attentively watching and listening to the performer. The atmosphere appears to be calm and focused, suggesting an intimate and engaging event. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the possible affiliation or sponsorship of the event.
